compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect ticket lifecycle management
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new ticket lifecycle management capabilities.
**Why**: CLAUDE.md and related docs must accurately describe the ARCHIVED event type, batch reducer, compact-on-close behavior, and lifecycle workflow so future agents have correct awareness.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section (ticket system description), update quick reference table with new commands (ticket compact, ticket-lifecycle.sh), document ARCHIVED event semantics
- OUT: Creating new documentation files, v2 cleanup (.index.json/merge-ticket-index.py removal)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the ARCHIVED event type, batch reducer, compact-on-close behavior, and ticket-lifecycle CI workflow
- When this story is complete, the quick reference table includes ticket compact and ticket-lifecycle.sh commands

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Story complete: CLAUDE.md updated with lifecycle management documentation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
